Goal: The last circular archway right in front of the road
Instruction: Walk straight along the red brick sidewalk, keeping the street on your left and the buildings on your right. Continue past the parked cars and the building with the large glass windows on your right. Cross the small asphalt driveway near the blue pedestrian crossing sign and continue straight onto the brick path. Follow the brick path as it enters a tree-lined area, keeping the trees on both sides of you. Walk straight through the series of silver circular archways over the path. Stop just after passing through the last silver circular archway, right before the road ahead. This is your destination.
